studio.title: A personal studio brand built by Jacob.
studio.description1: The Studio Cove is my creative workspace for multimedia work. A cove is a sheltered place where rough waters calm down, so the name represents how I bring raw ideas into a focused space and shape them into clean, polished digital work.
studio.description2: It also reflects my personal identity. The word "Cove" is inspired by the inner sound of Jacob, making the brand feel professional while still staying connected to me.
hero.name: John Jacob Tamon
hero.role: Graphics Designer | Video Editor | Social Media Manager | IT Student
hero.description: I create multimedia assets, manage social content, edit videos, and support digital workflows through The Studio Cove.
skills.title: What I Do
skills.description: Over 3 years of hands-on experience in digital media, social accounts, technical workflows, and multimedia editing for school, church, and client projects.
samples.title: Selected Work
samples.description: Video edits, graphics, and digital media samples from The Studio Cove.
contact.title: Work With Me
contact.description: For video editing, graphics, or social media support, reach me here.
